title: begonia biliranensis
intro: Begonia biliranensis, also known as Biliran begonia, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, endemic to the Philippines. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Begonia biliranensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion to be consumed as a tea, or as a topical application to the affected area.
